title: The Hex Pack
description: A joke modpack centered around Hex Casting, Hexlands, and color hex codes, with a lot of cursed mods on top.
body: A modpack made for an April fool's event on the beep boop central server. It is centered around Hex Casting, Hexlands, and color hex codes, with a lot of cursed mods on top. Essentially the opposite of Technetium.
